scripts.dev:api: set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; cd apps/api && bun run dev
scripts.dev:worker: set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; cd apps/worker && bun run dev
scripts.dev:web: set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; cd apps/web && bun run dev
scripts.db:migrate: set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; cd packages/db && bun run migrate
scripts.db:generate: set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; cd packages/db && bun run generate
scripts.typecheck: cd packages/contracts && bun run typecheck && cd ../config && bun run typecheck && cd ../db && bun run typecheck && cd ../events && bun run typecheck && cd ../github && bun run typecheck && cd ../storage && bun run typecheck && cd ../documents && bun run typecheck && cd ../runtime && bun run typecheck && cd ../testing && bun run typecheck && cd ../../apps/api && bun run typecheck && cd ../worker && bun run typecheck && cd ../web && bun run typecheck
scripts.test:integration: bun test ./test/integration/api.integration.ts && bun test ./test/integration/db.integration.ts && bun test ./test/integration/nats.integration.ts && bun test ./test/integration/temporal-workflow.integration.ts && bun test ./test/integration/worker-activity.integration.ts
scripts.test:all: bun run test:unit && bun run test:integration && bun run test:e2e
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run test:unit && cd apps/web && bun run build
scripts.check:full: bun run check && bun run test:integration && bun run test:e2e
